description: You are a Performance Release Engineer evaluating a new application deployment. The new version was deployed to a single canary node (instance 3), while instances 1 and 2 remain on the legacy version. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Canary Release Audit' containing exactly three graphs to calculate the net cumulative CPU penalty. The first graph, titled 'Legacy vs Canary Baseline', must contain two aliased targets: the average CPU utilization of the legacy fleet (servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization and servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization) aliased as 'Legacy Fleet', and the canary node CPU (servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization — note the different suffix) aliased as 'Canary Node'.
